title: Sikao Black Pens | 60 Pack Retractable Ballpoint Pens Multipack | Black Ink Medium Point 1.0mm | Smooth Writing Ball Point | School Office Supplies, Box of Pens Bulk (Black Ink)
features: SMOOTH: Sikao SA-004O Black Ballpoint pens, featuring ultra-smooth dark Black ink and a reliable tungsten carbide ball that glides effortlessly across almost any paper surface.
LINES: Pens ballpoint with standard medium point 1.0mm, ensures vivid and clear lines with every stroke, providing a skip-less and no bleed-through writing experience.
COMFORT: A flexible round pen barrel for ultimate writing comfort, a Black translucent barrel that lets you easily check the remaining ink level.
CONVENIENT: Enjoy the ease of a click retractable pens design for quick writing and journaling. The sturdy pen clip allows for easy attachment to books or pockets.
VALUE PACK: This pack includes 60 black ballpoint pens, perfect for long-term use or sharing within a team. Ideal for schools, offices, and various service industries.
